top_plays.title: Done-For-You Launch Kit: 48-Hour Turnaround
top_plays.target_buyer: Course creator, coach, or consultant launching a new offer in next 30 days
niche_examples: Agency owners launching new service tier
offer: Basic tracking setup (UTM parameters + conversion pixels)
top_plays.guarantee_or_risk_reversal: 100% money-back if not delivered in 48 hours OR if launch doesn't generate at least 1 sale within 7 days of going live
fastest_path_to_first_cash: Post in three Facebook groups for coaches and course creators. Message should say: 'Launching something? Get a complete launch kit in 48 hours. DM me.' This takes about 15 minutes.
Send twenty direct messages to people who posted about launching. Use the DM script provided below. This takes about 30 minutes.
First responder books a 15-minute call via the Calendly link you set up.
On the call: qualify their need, show two examples of previous work, close with either a deposit of $297 or pay-in-full of $497.
Collect requirements document from client. This should include offer details, target audience, and launch date.
Deliver the complete launch kit within 48 hours. If they paid deposit, collect the final payment now.
Follow-up with email sequence to get testimonial and referral for future clients.

acquisition_channel.primary: Outbound DMs in Facebook groups + LinkedIn (coaches/course creators)

outreach_script.dm: Hey [Name], saw you're launching [their offer]. I help coaches/course creators get launch-ready in 48 hours: landing page, email sequence, traffic plan, checkout setup. Done-for-you. Want to see 2 examples? (Takes 2 min)
outreach_script.email:
Subject: 48-Hour Launch Kit for [Their Offer Name]

Hi [Name],

Saw you're launching [offer]. Most launches fail because they're missing one piece: the funnel, the traffic plan, or the email sequence.

I've helped [X] creators launch in the last 90 days. Here's what I deliver in 48 hours:

✅ High-converting landing page (copy + design)
✅ 5-email nurture sequence
✅ Stripe checkout configured
✅ 30-day traffic plan
✅ Launch day checklist

Price: $497 (or $297 deposit, $200 on delivery)

Want to see 2 examples? Reply 'EXAMPLES' and I'll send them.

[Your Name]
outreach_script.call_opener: Hey [Name], this is [Your Name]. I saw you're launching [offer] and wanted to see if you need help getting launch-ready fast. I do done-for-you launch kits in 48 hours - landing page, emails, traffic plan, the works. Do you have 3 minutes to see if this makes sense?
follow_up_5: Follow-up 1 (24h): 'Hey [Name], just checking in - did you get a chance to look at those examples? Happy to answer any questions.'
Follow-up 2 (48h): 'Hey [Name], I'm booking launch kits for next week. If you're still interested, I can reserve a slot. Just need to know by [date].'
Follow-up 3 (72h): 'Hey [Name], last check - are you moving forward with your launch? If so, I can still fit you in this week.'
Follow-up 4 (1 week): 'Hey [Name], I know timing matters. If you're launching in the next 30 days, I can still help. What's your launch date?'
Follow-up 5 (2 weeks): 'Hey [Name], hope your launch went well! If you need help with the next one, I'm here.'

top_plays.close_mechanism: Calendly link → 15-min call → Stripe checkout (deposit or pay-in-full) → Requirements doc → Delivery in 48h
dependencies_blockers: Need 2-3 example landing pages to show (can use templates + customize quickly)
Need basic landing page builder (Carrd, ConvertKit, or similar)
Need email sequence templates (can create from scratch in 2 hours)
risk_controls: No guarantee of sales results - only delivery guarantee
Clear scope boundaries (1 page, 5 emails, basic tracking)
Client must provide: offer details, target audience, launch date within 30 days

growth: Post in 10 Facebook groups (coaches/course creators) - 3 posts/day
Send 30 DMs/day to people posting about launches
Reach out to 3 launch coaches for partnership (20% referral fee)
domains_webops: Set up landing page template (Carrd or ConvertKit)
Create Stripe checkout links (3 price points)
Set up basic tracking (UTM parameters template)
community: Collect 2-3 testimonials from past clients (or create case studies)
tools_product: Create email sequence template (5 emails, customizable)
ops: Create Stripe products for 3 price points
Set up basic CRM tracking (spreadsheet or Airtable)

next_24h_checklist: Create 2 example landing pages (use templates, customize)

top_plays.title: Done-For-You Funnel Build: Lead Gen + Email Sequence
top_plays.target_buyer: Local service business owner (plumber, HVAC, roofer, landscaper, electrician) or B2B service provider (accountant, lawyer, consultant)
niche_examples: Roofing companies launching new service area
offer: Basic tracking setup (Google Analytics + conversion tracking)
30-day traffic plan (Facebook ads OR local partnerships)

price_points.label: Premium: + Facebook Ads Setup + Management (30 days)

top_plays.guarantee_or_risk_reversal: 100% money-back if not delivered in 7 days OR if you don't get at least 5 qualified leads in first 30 days (with traffic plan executed)
fastest_path_to_first_cash: Post in five local business Facebook groups for plumbers, contractors, and similar businesses. Message should say: 'Need more booked calls? I build lead gen funnels for local businesses. DM me.'
Send twenty-five direct messages to business owners who posted about needing leads. Use the DM script provided below.
First responder books a 20-minute call via your Calendly link.
On the call: show two examples of previous funnels, qualify the prospect by asking if they have budget and timeline, then close with either a deposit of $397 or pay-in-full of $697.
Collect requirements from client. This should include service type, target geographic area, and current lead sources.
Deliver the complete funnel within seven days. If they paid deposit, collect the final payment now.
Follow-up with client to get testimonial and create a case study for future marketing.

acquisition_channel.primary: Outbound DMs in local business Facebook groups + Nextdoor
acquisition_channel.secondary: Partnership with 2-3 local business coaches/consultants (20% referral fee)

outreach_script.dm: Hey [Name], saw you're [their business type]. I help [business type] get more booked calls with a simple lead gen funnel. Landing page + email sequence + traffic plan. Done in 7 days. Want to see 2 examples?
outreach_script.email:
Subject: Lead Gen Funnel for [Business Type]

Hi [Name],

Most [business type] struggle with consistent leads. I build done-for-you lead gen funnels that get booked calls.

What you get in 7 days:

✅ Lead capture landing page
✅ 5-email nurture sequence
✅ SMS follow-up (3 messages)
✅ Calendar booking setup
✅ 30-day traffic plan

Price: $697 (or $397 deposit, $300 on delivery)

I've helped [X] local businesses get 5-20 qualified leads/month.

Want to see 2 examples? Reply 'EXAMPLES'.

[Your Name]
outreach_script.call_opener: Hey [Name], this is [Your Name]. I help [business type] get more booked calls with lead gen funnels. I saw you're in [area] - are you looking to get more consistent leads?
follow_up_5: Follow-up 1 (24h): 'Hey [Name], did you get a chance to check those examples? Happy to answer questions.'
Follow-up 2 (48h): 'Hey [Name], I'm booking funnel builds for next week. If you're interested, I can reserve a slot.'
Follow-up 3 (72h): 'Hey [Name], last check - are you still looking to get more leads? I can still fit you in this week.'
Follow-up 4 (1 week): 'Hey [Name], I know lead gen is urgent. If you're ready to move forward, I can start this week.'
Follow-up 5 (2 weeks): 'Hey [Name], hope business is going well! If you need help with lead gen, I'm here.'

top_plays.close_mechanism: Calendly link → 20-min call → Stripe checkout (deposit or pay-in-full) → Requirements doc → Delivery in 7 days
dependencies_blockers: Need landing page builder (Carrd, ConvertKit, or similar)
Need email/SMS automation (ConvertKit, Twilio, or similar)
Need calendar booking tool (Calendly or Cal.com)
risk_controls: No guarantee of lead volume - only delivery guarantee
Client must provide: service details, target area, current lead sources
Traffic plan requires client to execute (or pay for premium with ads management)

growth: Post in 10 local business Facebook groups - 2 posts/day
Send 25 DMs/day to business owners posting about needing leads
Reach out to 3 local business coaches for partnership
domains_webops: Set up landing page template (lead capture form)
Create Stripe checkout links (3 price points)
Set up basic tracking (Google Analytics + conversion pixels)
community: Collect 2-3 testimonials from past clients (or create case studies)
tools_product: Create email sequence template (5 emails, customizable)
ops: Create Stripe products for 3 price points

top_plays.title: Affiliate Engine Installation: 72-Hour Setup
top_plays.target_buyer: Course creator, coach, or digital product seller with existing offer (course, coaching, software) wanting to add affiliate program
niche_examples: Course creators with $5k+ in sales wanting to scale
Coaches with 50+ clients wanting referral program
Digital product sellers wanting partner network
Membership site owners wanting growth engine
offer: Affiliate program setup (platform: Rewardful, FirstPromoter, or custom)
Affiliate recruitment page (landing page + application form)
Affiliate commission structure setup (tiered if needed)
top_plays.guarantee_or_risk_reversal: 100% money-back if not delivered in 72 hours OR if affiliate program doesn't track commissions correctly
fastest_path_to_first_cash: Post in five course creator and coach Facebook groups. Message should say: 'Want to add affiliates to your course or coaching? I set up affiliate programs in 72 hours. DM me.'
Send twenty direct messages to people who have courses or coaching programs. Use the DM script provided below.
First responder books a 20-minute call via your Calendly link.

On the call: show two examples of affiliate programs you've set up, qualify the prospect by asking if they have an existing offer and what their sales volume is, then close with either a deposit of $497 or pay-in-full of $997.
Collect requirements from client. This should include offer details, desired commission structure, and existing platform they're using.
Deliver the complete affiliate program setup within 72 hours. If they paid deposit, collect the final payment now.
Follow-up with client to get testimonial and create a case study for future marketing.

acquisition_channel.primary: Outbound DMs in course creator/coach Facebook groups + LinkedIn
acquisition_channel.secondary: Partnership with 2-3 course launch coaches (20% referral fee)

outreach_script.dm: Hey [Name], saw you have [their course/coaching]. I help course creators add affiliate programs in 72 hours - tracking, recruitment page, onboarding sequence, the works. Want to see 2 examples?
outreach_script.email:
Subject: Affiliate Program Setup for [Their Course/Coaching]

Hi [Name],

Most course creators leave money on the table by not having affiliates.

I set up complete affiliate programs in 72 hours:

✅ Affiliate tracking platform setup
✅ Recruitment landing page
✅ 5-email onboarding sequence
✅ Commission structure configuration
✅ 30-day recruitment plan

Price: $997 (or $497 deposit, $500 on delivery)

I've helped [X] creators add affiliates and scale revenue 2-5x.

Want to see 2 examples? Reply 'EXAMPLES'.

[Your Name]
outreach_script.call_opener: Hey [Name], this is [Your Name]. I help course creators add affiliate programs to scale revenue. Do you have an existing course or coaching program?
follow_up_5: Follow-up 1 (24h): 'Hey [Name], did you get a chance to check those examples? Happy to answer questions.'
Follow-up 2 (48h): 'Hey [Name], I'm booking affiliate setups for this week. If you're interested, I can reserve a slot.'
Follow-up 3 (72h): 'Hey [Name], last check - are you still interested in adding affiliates? I can still fit you in this week.'
Follow-up 4 (1 week): 'Hey [Name], I know scaling revenue is urgent. If you're ready, I can start this week.'
Follow-up 5 (2 weeks): 'Hey [Name], hope your course is going well! If you want to add affiliates, I'm here.'

top_plays.close_mechanism: Calendly link → 20-min call → Stripe checkout (deposit or pay-in-full) → Requirements doc → Delivery in 72 hours
dependencies_blockers: Need affiliate platform access (Rewardful, FirstPromoter, or similar)
Need 2-3 example affiliate programs to show
Client must have existing offer (course, coaching, software)
Client must have Stripe/Payment processor already set up
risk_controls: No guarantee of affiliate sign-ups or sales - only setup guarantee
Client must provide: offer details, commission structure, existing platform
Affiliate recruitment is client's responsibility (unless premium package)
